title: sales director
description:
CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:

Drives revenue growth by setting strategic sales goals, leading high-performance teams, and optimizing processes.

Key responsibilities include forecasting, CRM management, cultivating key client relationships, and aligning sales initiatives with company objectives to maximize profitability. Also manage performance metrics, coach staff, and identify market opportunities to expand the customer base.

Key Duties and Responsibilities:

  • Strategic Planning & Goal Setting: Define and execute sales strategies, create annual/quarterly/monthly quotas, and forecast revenue to align with business objectives.
  • Team Leadership & Management: Hire, train, mentor, and motivate the sales team, ensuring they have the tools and skills to meet performance targets.
  • Sales Operations & Process Optimization: Oversee CRM usage, manage the sales pipeline, analyze performance data, and refine sales processes to increase efficiency.
  • Client & Relationship Management: Nurture relationships with high-value clients and stakeholders to secure major contracts and drive account retention.
  • Market Analysis & Reporting: Monitor industry trends, conduct competitor analysis to adjust pricing/strategies, and report sales metrics to executive leadership.
  • Collaboration & Representation: Collaborate with marketing and product teams on campaigns, and represent the firm at industry events. 

Required Skills and Qualifications:

  • Leadership: Strong ability to motivate and lead a team.
  • Strategic Thinking: Ability to develop long-term plans to achieve growth.
  • Communication & Negotiation: Excellent interpersonal skills for client negotiation and stakeholder management.
  • Analytical Skills: Ability to analyse sales data and market trends.
  • CRM Proficiency: Experience with customer relationship management software.

postedCompany.description:
R&G BUSINESS SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.

R&G BUSINESS SOLUTIONS IS A PROMINENT CONSULTING FIRM WITH A STRONG ASIA PACIFIC PRESENCE.

 

Our commitment to our clients is to go beyond business solutions and into business partnership, we take pride in representing our clients and proactive in participating in your growth. By providing thought leadership and guidance, we assist our business partners to navigate and manage the lucrative,highly complex and uncertain markets of Asia Pacific.

To our candidates, we believe in long-term relationships. Our consultants strive to have a complete understanding of every candidate's needs, career objectives and motivations and continue to help build and manage their careers.

With a wide International Network of recruitment offices, skill training centres and education partners in major labour exporting countries in Asia, we are confident of delivering workers with the right mindset, knowledge, skills and experience to satisfy our client's staffing requirement.
